ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is on */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Reference to the position the player plays */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player (Right, Left) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player (Right, Left) */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player ended their professional career (NULL if active) */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (Active, Injured, Retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team is part of */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium FOREIGN KEY ("stadium") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistics apply to */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles hit */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples hit */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "strike_outs" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "on_base_plus_slugging" REAL /* On-base plus slugging */,
  "strikeouts_per_walk" REAL /* Strikeouts per walk ratio */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Total number of plate appearances */,
  "sacrifice_hits" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice hits */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies */,
  "intentional_walks" INTEGER /* Number of intentional walks */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Number of times hit by pitch */,
  "ground_into_double_play" INTEGER /* Number of times grounded into double play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league's commissioner */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "league_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position's role */,
  "position_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the position's logo */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the position's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "opened_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  "stadium_website" TEXT /* URL to the stadium's official website */,
  "stadium_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles */,
  "stadium_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the manager is managing */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manager's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manager's tenure */,
  "manager_website" TEXT /* URL to the manager's official website */,
  "manager_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles */,
  "manager_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Home Win, Away Win) */,
  "game_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "game_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the home plate umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
